sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'
import Container from 'react-bootstrap/Container'
import Form from 'react-bootstrap/Form'

export const TicketForm = () => {
    return (
        <Container>
            <Form>
                <Form.Group controlId='form.Title'>
                    <Form.Label>Ticket Title</Form.Label>
                    <Form.Control type='text' placeholder="Please enter Ticket Title" />
                </Form.Group>
                <Form.Group controlId='form.Description'>
                    <Form.Label>Ticket Description</Form.Label>
                    <Form.Control as='textarea' placeholder='Please describe your ticket'rows = {3} />
                </Form.Group>
                <Form.Group controlId='form.serverity'>
                    <Form.Label>Ticket severity</Form.Label>
                    <Form.Select aria-label="Default select example">
                        <option>Open this select menu</option>
                        <option value="1">Low</option>
                        <option value="2">Medium</option>
                        <option value="3">High</option>
                        <option value="4">Urgent</option>
                    </Form.Select>
                </Form.Group>
                <Form.Group controlId = 'form.date'>
                    <Form.Label>Date for Ticket</Form.Label>
                    <Form.Control type='date' name = 'Date for ticket' />
                </Form.Group>

            </Form>
        </Container>
    )
}
